title: Senegal parade Afcon trophy despite title controversy
content: Senegal parade the Africa Cup of Nations trophy before Saturday's friendly match against Peru in Paris - despite being stripped of the title earlier this month.

title: Fans booing Scotland surprise and disappoint Clarke
